name: PA Senate Update
subject: in the top 5 (NPR)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/1213666343765671936/-1407070318832386048?refcode=e20160502&refcode2=e20160502nd&amount=25)
---
Friend -- BREAKING news: **_NPR_ just ranked Pat Toomey's Senate seat as one of the TOP FIVE most likely to flip this year.** It's what we've known all along -- the path to retaking the Senate for Democrats runs right through Pennsylvania.

**It 's more important than ever for Democrats who care about reclaiming the Senate and pushing a progressive agenda to support Katie.** Toomey and his special interest backers have already started running negative ads -- six-figures' worth. **We have to fight back before it 's too late.**

[**Friend, we 've extended our Rapid Response fundraising deadline because of this breaking news. Can we count on you for a contribution right now? **](https://act.myngp.com/el/1213666343765671936/-1407070318832386048?refcode=e20160502&refcode2=e20160502nd&amount=25)

Thanks,

Team Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1213666343765671936/-1407070318832386048?refcode=e20160502&refcode2=e20160502nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---

Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Joe Sestak
subject: thank you
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17198e1/3476a20e/da9e18e/27425854/2069166937/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, What I most valued in this recent campaign were my supporters throughout Pennsylvania. I know that time is precious in our busy lives, but if you have a moment in yours to spare, I will be at Sweet Creams Cafe located at 429 Main St in Stroudsburg at 12:00 pm this Tuesday, May 3, so I might say "thank you" to you personally. Please know I recognize you may well have other commitments, but I cannot let the campaign end without my coming back to each locale whose supporters meant so much to me. Thank you for your belief in me, and I hope to say the same to you on Tuesday!
Warmly, Joe
---

| [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17198e1/3476a20e/da9e18e/27425853/2069166937/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/joesestak")[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17198e1/3476a20e/da9e18e/27425852/2069166937/VEsF/ "https://twitter.com/joesestak")

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Why Indiana is so important
body:
#
Let's talk about the state of the race as it stands today, sisters and brothers. For us to win the majority of pledged delegates, we need to win 654 out of the remaining 1,061.
That is 64 percent. It is admittedly a tough hill to climb, but not an impossible one. We intend to fight for every vote and delegate remaining, starting with tomorrow night's primary in Indiana where recent polling shows us well with the margin of error:
**NBC - Indiana Primary (April 29)**
**Clinton** : 50%
**Sanders** : 46%
Winning Indiana tomorrow night would not only cut into Secretary Clinton's lead, but it would send a powerful message to the political establishment and corporate media who just want this race to end so they can get on with the ratings and fundraising bonanza that would be a Clinton v. Trump general election. But Bernie is going to keep fighting, and that's why we have to ask:
[**Your $2.70 contribution before Indiana votes tomorrow night will help us win a very important state while sending a powerful message that you are in this campaign as long as Bernie continues to fight.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/indiana-poll?refcode=em160502-s1-sub-b "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/indiana-poll?refcode=em160502-s1-sub-b")
Let's be clear. It is virtually impossible for Secretary Clinton to win all of the pledged delegates she needs to capture the nomination without the help of superdelegates at the convention. That means every vote we receive, every delegate we win between now and July strengthens our hand as we get to a contested convention.
Indiana's next. Let's go out and win our 18th state tomorrow night.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/indiana-poll?refcode=em160502-s1-sub-b "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/indiana-poll?refcode=em160502-s1-sub-b")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Russ Feingold
subject: Unwavering
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Thank you for all that you do. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf429e/1c469400/51c325b/3562259/1111917618/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-april?utm_source=ema_2016-05-02_EOM-ty_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-02_EOM-ty_nd&utm_campaign=EOM-ty&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Thanks to your support, we crushed our April goal! There wasn't a doubt in my mind that we could do it: When we set big goals, this grassroots team always steps up to meet them. Whether it's $5 or $500, each individual contribution helps us keep our ads up longer and put more miles on the campaign van -- allowing me to listen to more hardworking Wisconsinites all across our beautiful state. **[If you weren't able to chip in toward our April goal, it's not too late to support the campaign. Anything -- even $1! -- goes a long way.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf429e/1c469400/51c325b/3562259/1111917618/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-april?utm_source=ema_2016-05-02_EOM-ty_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-02_EOM-ty_nd&utm_campaign=EOM-ty&utm_medium=ema")** Thank you so much for your unwavering support. name: Corry Bliss
subject: Shredded [WATCH]
body:
| Peter -- I want you to be among the first to watch “Shredded,” a new web ad detailing former Governor Ted Strickland’s harmful budget cuts that wreaked havoc across Ohio.

No Ohioan was left untouched by Strickland’s budgeting decisions. “Shredded” begins running online across Ohio immediately.

[](https://www.robportman.com/shredded?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shredded_blast&n=1)
Ted Strickland has the worst record of any Senate candidate in America. As governor, he oversaw the loss of more than 350,000 jobs, Ohio ranked 48th in job creation, the rainy day fund was drained to 89 cents, and despite leaving Ohioans with an unprecedented $8 billion budget gap, Strickland cut funds for Ohio’s children, needy, elderly, mentally ill, addicted, and colleges and universities.

Ohio simply can't afford a return to Ted Strickland's Ohio. Ohio voters have a clear choice in November between moving forward with Rob's pro-growth policies for better wages and more jobs, or returning to Ted Strickland's failed policies of higher taxes, more regulations, and bigger government.

Please [watch "Shredded,"](https://www.robportman.com/shredded?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shredded_blast&n=2) forward it to five of your friends, and if you can, [please donate](https://www.robportman.com/shredded?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shredded_blast&n=3) to help more people see the video. Sincerely, Corry Bliss [](https://www.robportman.com/shredded?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shredded_blast&n=4) [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shredded_blast&n=5)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shredded_blast&n=6)

---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shredded_blast&n=7). -=-=-

name: Katie McGinty
subject: Give America a raise (sign on)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5845340384074399744/2484602709169143808?sc=minwage2016_ja_mcginty)
---
Friend,

Growing up, my family had to squeeze to make ends meet and I'll bet yours did too. It was even tighter for other families in our neighborhood.

**I 've never forgotten my roots, and that's why I'm so committed to our shared fight for a higher minimum wage.** Not only is it the right thing to do, but it will improve our economy by putting more money in the pockets of working families.

But I'm not naive -- getting a higher minimum wage will be a heck of a fight. So we need to show beyond a doubt that Pennsylvanians are in support of this movement. [**Will you sign your name to give hardworking Americans a raise? Every person who joins me helps send the message that Americans want a fair wage!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5845340384074399744/2484602709169143808?sc=minwage2016_ja_mcginty)

Toomey made millions as a Wall Street banker, and then turned around and fought to repeal Wall Street reform in Congress. It's no wonder that with Toomey and his buddies in control of the Senate, getting a minimum wage raise has been impossible.

**That 's why we need to put Democrats back in charge of the Senate** \-- including the Pennsylvania seat I'm running for. Then we can implement the agenda the American people want and deserve, starting with a higher minimum wage.

[**But first, I need your help. Will you add your name to my call for a higher minimum wage?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5845340384074399744/2484602709169143808?sc=minwage2016_ja_mcginty)

Thank you,

Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5845340384074399744/2628717897244999680?refcode=e20160502.2&refcode2=e20160502.2&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/5845340384074399744/2412545115131215872).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

| I just wanted to reach out to say thank you, Friends. With your grassroots support, we met our fundraising goal for April! That means we're prepared to capitalize on the recent polls that have us ahead in the Democratic primary -- and we can also be ready for the huge GOP attacks that are headed our way.

Whether you gave $3 or $300, it means so much to me and the team. We wouldn't be where we are without you.

Thank you so much,

Patrick

P.S. name: Sheila O'Connell, Chris Van Hollen for US Senate
subject: the next challenge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|

>
> Friend,
>
> Just last Tuesday, Chris won the Democratic Primary with strong support from all across our state. That victory was due to supporters like you who stepped up and got involved in this important election year.
>
> We have one more hurdle to get Chris to the U.S. Senate. With your help, we are going to keep fighting for every vote until the November general election. I know you'll be fighting just as hard by our side.

clean_body: | Friend, Just last Tuesday, Chris won the Democratic Primary with strong support from all across our state. That victory was due to supporters like you who stepped up and got involved in this important election year. We have one more hurdle to get Chris to the U.S. Senate. With your help, we are going to keep fighting for every vote until the November general election. I know you'll be fighting just as hard by our side.
